function.name: browser_navigate
function.description: Opens a URL in the browser. Returns the page title and final URL after any redirects. Use this to start browsing or jump to a new page.

url.description: The URL to navigate to. https:// is added automatically if no scheme is provided.

function.name: browser_go_back
function.description: Navigates back to the previous page in the browser history. Returns the page title and URL landed on.

function.name: browser_reload
function.description: Reloads the current page. Useful after form submissions or when a page needs to be refreshed.

function.name: browser_close
function.description: Closes the browser and resets the session. Use this when browser tasks are fully complete to free up resources. The browser will relaunch automatically on next use.

function.name: browser_get_text
function.description: Extracts all readable text from the current page, optionally scoped to a CSS selector. Use for summarising, reading articles, or grabbing content from a specific section.

selector.description: Optional CSS selector to scope text extraction to (e.g. 'article', '#content', '.main'). Defaults to 'body' for the full page.

function.name: browser_get_links
function.description: Returns all links on the current page with their anchor text and URLs. Use this to discover navigation options or find specific pages to visit.

function.name: browser_scroll
function.description: Scrolls the page down by a given number of pixels. Use this for lazy-loaded content, infinite scroll pages, or to trigger content that loads on scroll.

amount.description: Number of pixels to scroll down. Defaults to 500. Call multiple times for larger scrolls.
